form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Alleviate carrying 55.5kg at $81. The race before that ran last of 9 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on February 12 over 1200m, 10 len behind Plunger with 55.5kg at $201. Won't find this any easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly before then being hampered by Lightwatch.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages and got its head up.
Slow to begin. Over raced in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind I Said So with 59.5kg at $21. The run before that 8th of 13 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Manifest The Milli with 56.5kg at $31. Place chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1000m, eased when placed close to the heels of Unriddle.
Slow into stride. Near the 1000m shifted in and brushed the running rail.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 7th of 11 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Deliberate Ploy with 59kg at $9.50. Second-up 2nd of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on a wet track; 2.5 len behind On The Prowl carrying 59kg at $11. Better again and rates a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Rebel Dane - Qualify) who was bought for AUD $ 105,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Adelaide Yearling Sale). He has seven recent trials prior to his debut today. Finished seventh in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Respecting.

form.formComment: At debut, 8th of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 5.5 len behind Western Lane with 59kg at $7. Can do better. Should be improving up in trip.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of three months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw January 8 over 2200m, 5 len behind Gold Label Patch carrying 54.5kg at $2.90. First up last campaign eighth of 10 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw October 12 over 1600m, 5 len behind Banker?S Cute with 57.5kg at $81. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead in the middle stages.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages. Near the 50m, bumped by You Rower.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and bumped with French Crossing.
Began awkwardly. Raced keenly and three wide without cover throughout.
